---
name: Musician Feedback / Notation Correction
about: Submit feedback on raga grammar, Gamakas, or generated phrasing.
title: "[MUSICIAN] - "
labels: 'music-theory, feedback'
assignees: ''
---

**Which Raga does this feedback relate to?**
(e.g., Mayamalavagowla, Kalyani)

**Describe the Issue / Observation:**
How did the model perform? Did it generate an *Apaswara* (out-of-scale note)? Did it violate the *Arohana/Avarohana* structure? 

**Characteristic Phrase (Sanchara) Context:**
If a specific characteristic phrase was incorrect or missing, please describe it using standard Carnatic notation (Sa, Ri, Ga, Ma, Pa, Da, Ni).

**Ideal Behavior:**
How should this phrase sound theoretically? (Please mention any critical Gamakas like Kampita or Jaru if applicable).

**Additional Context:**
Any relevant audio links or literature references?
